failed_checks: vertical-4: 112.5 downward component was ambiguous in blind review

evidence.cardinals: Blind consensus confirms 000 up, 090 screen-right, 180 down, and 270 screen-left; all hard gates passed.
evidence.labeled_loop: Normal-size labeled review confirms 112.5 remains down-right and 247.5 remains down-left in the ordered loop, although their vertical component is subtle in isolation.
evidence.continuity: The 16 directions progress monotonically with stable height and baseline and no visible reversal or clipping.
evidence.alpha_holes: The reported transparent rows are normal negative space between arms, legs, and shoes, not transparent holes inside the sponge body.
evidence.deterministic: The v2 atlas validator and chroma-despill report both pass without errors or warnings.
